title: uragoga fimbricalyx
side_effects: Uragoga fimbricalyx can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, diarrhea, and stomach cramps in individuals who consume it in large quantities. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue due to its potential interference with the body's natural balance of essential nutrients. In rare cases, improper use of uragoga fimbricalyx may trigger allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. Additionally, the plant's high concentration of certain compounds may interact with prescription medications, exacerbating existing health conditions or causing unintended consequences.
